name: Salma Hayek
subject: Will you join Latinos for Hillary?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Latinos por Hillary: | _Award-winning actress, producer, and activist Salma Hayek is a proud member of Latinos for Hillary.
[Join her: Add your name today.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)_

Friend --

_Es increíble_ that the leading candidate of the Republican Party has been irresponsibly campaigning, using unfounded and insulting accusations against the Latino community to win votes.

We cannot let hate and discrimination determine the outcome of this election. We owe it to the hard-working Latinos that came before us, to ourselves, and to our children, to show the people who unfairly label us as criminals and speak down to us that our community is strong, meaningful, and incredibly powerful.

We are one of the largest, youngest, and fastest-growing groups in the United States of America. We deserve a candidate who respects the contributions we have made to this country and understands how important it is that our community continues to thrive, all while treating us _con dignidad y respeto_.

**That's why today, I'm proud to help launch Latinos for Hillary.**

[**https://www.hillaryclinton.com/latinos-for-hillary/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

If you agree with me, join us. We cannot afford to be passive in this election. Talk or write to your family and friends -- let’s be one loud voice _imposible de ignorar_.

Salma

---
******Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM2ODYzNTQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzIzNTIzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Volunteer Opportunities with Donald Trump
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |

| |

\- October 06 2015 -
Donald Trump for President is Organizing across Virginia

| Dear Peter Willis, Thank you for signing up as a supporter of Donald Trump's presidential campaign. We have many volunteer opportunities! Come meet the Campaign Staff and learn how you can help Mr. Trump Make America Great Again!

**Hampton Roads**
Tuesday, 10/6 at 7:00pm
[See Details & Register as a Hampton Roads Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-j/)[
](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-t/)**Front Royal**
Wednesday, 10/7 at 7:00pm
[See Details & Register as a Front Royal area Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-i/) [
](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-d/)**Richmond-Henricho**
Thursday, 10/8 at 7:00pm
[See Details & Register as a Richmond area Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-h/) [
](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-k/)**Fredericksburg**
Monday, 10/12 at 7:00pm
[See Details & Register as a Fredericksburg region Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-u/) [
](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-o/)**Richmond**
Tuesday, 10/13 at 7:30pm
[See Details & Register as a Richmond area Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-b/) [
](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-n/)**Lynchburg**
Thursday, 10/15 at 7:30pm
[See Details & Register as a Lynchburg area Volunteer

****](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-p/)**Bristol**
Wednesday, 10/21 at 7:00pm
[See Details & Register as a Southwest Virginia Volunteer](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-zxddkk-drdiuiutjh-x/)
Virginia Field Director, Dena Espenscheid, and other volunteer leaders will be at these meetings to meet new volunteers and supporters for Mr. Trump. There are exciting opportunities to get involved in the campaign. Individual details for each date and location are available at each link. Come and discuss how you can make a difference.If you want to help the Donald J. Trump for President campaign, but can not come to these trainings e-mail Dena at [Dena@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:Dena@DonaldTrump.com). There is also a ticket option on each link to register as an area volunteer who can not attend the meeting.
---

subject: This is about you

| | | Peter, The Governor knows this campaign is not about him, it's about you and the future of our country. We've been talking to people across the country at town halls and meet and greets, but we want to hear from you. If you have a second, please share what issues concern you the most below. The Governor and the rest of our team will use this critical information moving forward to shape policy and outreach, so please feel free to share and speak up! [](www.chrischristie.com/be-heard?t=ouramericaourpresidency) Samantha Smith
Communications Director [ P.S. Watch the "Our Country, Our Presidency" Town Hall Launch video here! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44302103:6BYiM1LaN:m:1:1516426255:E0A6C3B5257A54E8E397AE74B84A16E4:r)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: #SCFlood Relief
body:
LindseyGraham.com

Friend, South Carolina needs your help.

Friend,

I've seen first-hand some of the devastation from the flooding in
South Carolina, and it is absolutely heartbreaking. This disaster
is some of nature's worst coming our way, but it is being met
with the best of human nature as thousands of neighbors and
volunteers step up to help each other.

With your support, South Carolina will remain strong and stable
throughout this tragedy. If you're able to help, please consider
donating through one of these organizations that are providing
critical disaster relief where it is most needed:

American Red Cross
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30854834:W5ZxpXmN_:m:3:877327319:6791DC0B42065B10BDDEF35E44A61D29:r

Or text REDCROSS to 90999

The Salvation Army USA
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30854836:W5ZxpXmN_:m:3:877327319:6791DC0B42065B10BDDEF35E44A61D29:r

Or text STORM to 51555

Thank you for your prayers for South Carolina.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

Paid for by Lindsey
Graham 2016

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW5ZxpXmN_

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW5ZxpXmN_

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-29599635445-echo3-0FB2740A7BD3B03C4AE0FAF2CDCCEF19@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Maya Harris, Official Clinton Campaign
subject: Fwd: Add your name to stand against gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
It's time to act | Friend --

After last week’s tragic shooting in Oregon, Jeb Bush’s response was “stuff happens,” and he basically said there was nothing we could do to prevent these tragedies. Donald Trump responded the same way, with “that’s the way the world goes.”

Hillary’s response was to roll out a comprehensive plan for how she’d address gun violence as president.

**I’m so proud to stand with Hillary. Are you? Add your name to show your support for her plan:**
[ | | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Maya

Maya Harris
Senior Policy Advisor
Hillary for America

\----Forwarded message:----
From: Hillary Clinton
Subject: Add your name to stand against gun violence

Friend --
Gun violence isn’t an inevitability -- it’s a virus and we must do whatever we can to stop it.

Our children should feel safe going to school. They should feel safe at the movie theater. And they should feel safe in places of worship.

It’s time for gun violence prevention in this country. We must stand up to the NRA and the Republicans who would like nothing more than to villainize us for “politicizing” this moment. I won’t back down from this fight.

**Say you’re with me. Sign up to take a stand against gun violence:**

[ | [**Add my name**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)

With a heavy heart,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=18&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM2OTIxNjQS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYwNzg0MzE0S0&mt=1&rt=0)
clean_body: It's time to act | Friend -- After last week’s tragic shooting in Oregon, Jeb Bush’s response was “stuff happens,” and he basically said there was nothing we could do to prevent these tragedies. Donald Trump responded the same way, with “that’s the way the world goes.” Hillary’s response was to roll out a comprehensive plan for how she’d address gun violence as president. I’m so proud to stand with Hillary. Are you? Add your name to show your support for her plan: --- ]() Thanks, Maya Maya Harris Senior Policy Advisor Hillary for America \----Forwarded message:---- From: Hillary Clinton Subject: Add your name to stand against gun violence Friend -- Gun violence isn’t an inevitability -- it’s a virus and we must do whatever we can to stop it. Our children should feel safe going to school. They should feel safe at the movie theater. And they should feel safe in places of worship. It’s time for gun violence prevention in this country. We must stand up to the NRA and the Republicans who would like nothing more than to villainize us for “politicizing” this moment. I won’t back down from this fight. Say you’re with me. Sign up to take a stand against gun violence: --- ]() With a heavy heart, Hillary Did someone forward this email to you? | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Team Marco
subject: You’ll like this

body:

---
| | | | Peter, You've probably been hearing and seeing plenty of Marco lately, with his appearances on TV, his dominating debate performances, and maybe even a campaign event you've gotten to attend. But it's always especially cool to get a look behind the scenes, and that's what a recent great segment on Fox News offers. One of their correspondent spent three days with Marco: a couple days in Iowa, and a day in Miami with Marco, Jeanette, and their kids. **[Check it out here:](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44313814:6jbpjmLNW:m:1:1349778030:856CB8752C80AF40D63A2C061F3E2346:r)**
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44313814:6jbpjmLNW:m:1:1349778030:856CB8752C80AF40D63A2C061F3E2346:r)
---
| You'll see Marco toss the pigskin around with his sons in Miami, and learn the story of how he and Jeanette got engaged. It's a fun watch. Thanks, as always, for your support, Team Marco
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

name: Team Jeb
subject: Friend, update your record
body:
Friend,

With the start of a new financial quarter, Jeb asked us to pull a list of his most loyal supporters -- those who have already stepped up again in Q4.

However, we noticed your name is missing. Is this right? Here's what we have on file for your email address:

** Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com**
** Jeb 2016 Q4 Supporter Status: Pending
[Suggested donation: $5](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mycgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjqcpws_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/lgzpsdhcqnjrzlzmrdypqrflhhrfclscpdwdjclkmhzh_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
*Our records are specific to the above email address and may not include recent or other offline donations.

Thankfully, there is still time.

[**If you chip in $5 in the next 48 hours to update your record, not only will we be able to send your name to the Governor, but we 'll send you the Official Jeb 2016 membership card in the mail.**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/igzkpbcqzdmwgrgywbfkzwtrccwtqrpqkbnbmqrhycyg_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uypbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjqhchh_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1).
We're also going to sweeten the pot. For the next 48 hours, we're cutting all membership prices in half. **Get your Official Jeb 2016 Membership Card for half price now:****[Jeb2016.com/Membership-Card](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uyfbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjqhchq_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

That's a pretty good deal, and it comes with a few perks: invites to exclusive strategy calls, tele-townhalls and a special discount at our official store.

But you have to act now. If you don't step up in the next 48 hours, we won't be able to pass your name on to the Governor.

**And we know Jeb will be disappointed if your name is missing. So chip in $5 in the next 48 hours to become a card-carrying member of the team:**

**[Jeb2016.com/Membership-Card](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mwngmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjqcpcy_vgjhhmyr.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Thank you,

Team Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4463&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: BECKER, Bernie 2016
subject: We need your help to pull off this idea
body:
#
Dear Bernie Supporters,
In two weeks, Bernie will be giving a big speech at the Iowa Democratic Party's Jefferson-Jackson Dinner. It is the largest gathering of Iowa Democrats of the year, and it comes exactly 100 days before the Iowa caucuses.
This event is a BIG deal. Usually, campaigns make sure big-time contributors get the premium tickets. That's what we expect the other candidates to do. Same old, same old.
**Our campaign has a _different_ idea, and we need your help to carry it out.**
We want to pack the Iowa Events Center with regular folks -- supporters carrying crushing student debt, parents who would benefit from a $15 minimum wage, and workers who have lost their jobs due to our disastrous trade policies.
General admission tickets cost $50 apiece, and **our campaign is asking for supporters across the country to sponsor a student, a parent, a worker, or a campaign supporter by covering their cost of admission.**
[**Contribute $25 to our campaign today and we 'll pair you with another supporter to cover the cost of admission for one person.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc112/3703316492/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?refcode=em151007jj-full")
Every member of the national political media will be there, and this is a moment we can ensure the voices of students, parents, and those looking for work are heard loud and clear. Let's send a powerful message about what a united national movement standing in solidarity with each other looks like.
All my best,
Robert Becker
Iowa State Director
Bernie 2016

[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc112/3703316492/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/j-j-dinner?refcode=em151007jj-full")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc113/3703316492/VEsF/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc110/3703316492/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc111/3703316492/VEsD/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb257d/43f17890/57c980ee/621fc11e/3703316492/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").

It is the largest gathering of Iowa Democrats of the year, and it comes exactly 100 days before the Iowa caucuses. This event is a BIG deal. Usually, campaigns make sure big-time contributors get the premium tickets. That's what we expect the other candidates to do. Same old, same old. Our campaign has a different idea, and we need your help to carry it out. We want to pack the Iowa Events Center with regular folks -- supporters carrying crushing student debt, parents who would benefit from a $15 minimum wage, and workers who have lost their jobs due to our disastrous trade policies. name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: I want you to be the first to see
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
Friend,

As one of my most dedicated supporters, I'm excited to share a brand new video on our new website, **[and I want you to be one of the first to see it.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd9/70cdc2ba/47a8d069/39632bd/2022404008/VEsH/ "http://vanhollen.org/?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+and+I+want+you+to+be+one+of+the+first+to&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615")**
[](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd9/70cdc2ba/47a8d069/39632b3/2022404008/VEsE/ "http://vanhollen.org/?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615")
This video shows the broad support our movement has across the state from some of Maryland's top leaders and activists.

**[I hope you'll take a few minutes to check out our new website and watch the video.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd9/70cdc2ba/47a8d069/3963144/2022404008/VEsF/ "http://vanhollen.org/?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+I+hope+yoursquoll+take+a+few+minutes+to+&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615")** And please, share it with your family and friends to help spread the word that our campaign is about getting results for the people of Maryland and our country on the many challenges we face today.

Thank you,

Chris

| Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91fd9/70cdc2ba/47a8d069/396315a/2022404008/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em100615&source=em100615") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages, please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Team Murphy
subject: Grayson's confused (VIDEO)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Alan Grayson's opinion seems to be exactly what his audience wants to hear -- even when his audiences want to hear different things.

Want to see how he tries to pull this off? _**Watch the video:**_ | [](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214a/738133e4/3a5ee5ff/7f8e4e98/2800750168/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151007")
---
No matter what Alan Grayson says today, the fact remains -- we just don't know what will come out of his mouth tomorrow.

Florida families don't need a phony political panderer like Grayson representing them in the Senate. They need a pragmatic problem-solver.

[_**Click here to watch Grayson's masterful pandering. Then pledge your support for a different kind of leader -- Patrick Murphy.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214a/738133e4/3a5ee5ff/7f8e4e98/2800750168/VEsE/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e151007")

Thanks!

Team Murphy

| | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae214a/738133e4/3a5ee5ff/7f8e4e99/2800750168/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
